About Organization

The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) is a government organization responsible for recruiting staff for various government departments and ministries.

The SSC conducts various exams and recruitments for different posts in the government sector.

About the Programme

The SSC Delhi Police Head Constable Ministerial Recruitment 2025 is a government job recruitment for the post of Head Constable Ministerial in the Delhi Police.

The recruitment is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria.
